fato_historico: 2013: Syrian civil war: The Battle of Ras al-Ayn resumes between the People's Protection Units (YPG) and Islamist forces, beginning the Rojava–Islamist conflict.
energia_do_dia: Today invites you to find stillness amidst the winds of change. Just as ancient spirits once navigated complex borders seeking peace, perhaps you may find it is a good time to protect your inner sanctuary. Focus on building bridges of understanding today; your steadfast nature is the four-leaf clover that attracts harmony into your beautiful life.
frase_do_dia: True strength blossoms when you cultivate peace within your own heart.
significado_numero: Represents the master builder and the manifestation of your greatest dreams.
conselho: Stand firm in your values while keeping your heart open to new perspectives.
